taxonomy_reason: Logic-puzzle and abstract constraint reasoning evaluation

rows.protocol_note: Model: Seed 2.0 Pro. Benchmark: puzzle_zero_shot (250 questions, 25 types). Probe questions: 241 across 5 rounds (95 + 55 + 30 + 31 + 30). Method: ProEval iterative hypothesis testing. Notes visible: surface scores systematically underestimate capability due to evaluator design flaws; top 5 false-loss types shown; Sudoku / Minesweeper / Word Brain Teasers have delta=0; prompt engineering ceiling test compares No Prompt, Basic Prompt, Expert Prompt.

source_caveat: The source does not document enough shared evaluation settings for strict cross-report comparison. This result remains source-scoped.

rows.evidence_quote: Figure 18 p.31 reports puzzle_zero_shot (Sudoku search depth: 50 givens), Pass Rate for Seed2.0 Pro = 100%.
